'''√ch-dh-s''' ('''kachadhas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaminoacylate|deaminoacylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaminoacylate|deaminoacylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ch-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kachadhas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thichadhas || jichadhas || shichadhas || kichadhas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuchadhas || jujuchadhas || shushuchadhas || kukuchadhas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuchadhas || juchadhas || shuchadhas || kuchadhas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuchadhas || juchadhas || shuchadhas || kuchadhas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thechadhas || jechadhas || shechadhas || kechadhas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothochadhas || jojochadhas || shoshochadhas || kokochadhas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thochadhas || jochadhas || shochadhas || kochadhas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thochadhas || jochadhas || shochadhas || kochadhas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas || chadhas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæchadhas || jæchadhas || shæchadhas || kæchadhas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathachadhas || jajachadhas || shashachadhas || kakachadhas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thachadhas || jachadhas || shachadhas || kachadhas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thachadhas || jachadhas || shachadhas || kachadhas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shachadhas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshachadhas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishachadhas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shachadhasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshachadhasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishachadhasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shachadhasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshachadhasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishachadhasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shachadhasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshachadhasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishachadhasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shachadhasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshachadhasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishachadhasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shachadhassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshachadhasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishachadhassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shachadhasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshachadhasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishachadhasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shachadhasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshachadhasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishachadhasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shachadhasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshachadhasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishachadhasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shachadhasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshachadhasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishachadhasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shachadhasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachadhasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachadhasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shachadhasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshachadhasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachadhasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shachadhasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshachadhasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishachadhasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shachadhasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachadhasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachadhasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shachadhasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshachadhasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachadhasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shachadhasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshachadhasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishachadhasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shachadhasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshachadhasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishachadhasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shachadhasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshachadhasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachadhasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shachadhasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshachadhasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishachadhasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shachadhasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshachadhasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishachadhasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shachadhasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachadhasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachadhasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
